parent="PKQHiiu8OhIHnTBV9gs3-15" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;fontSize=18;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 31px;">Rapid Deployment Modeling</font></h1><div><font style="font-size: 20px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 20px;">TRILOBITE's modeling structure allows for rapid implementation of transient models by tying together elements from the pre-existing physics libraries and / or developing custom physics methods.</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="290" x="10" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PKQHiiu8OhIHnTBV9gs3-23" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=50;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<font style="font-size: 25px;">Inference</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="410" width="310" x="870" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PKQHiiu8OhIHnTBV9gs3-24" parent="PKQHiiu8OhIHnTBV9gs3-23" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 31px;">Flexible Parameter Inference</font></h1><div><font style="font-size: 20px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 20px;">TRILOBITE's inference pipelines allow easy interacting with various sampling algorithms (MCMC, nested sampling, etc.) as well as use in simulation based inference (SBI) techniques.</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="290" x="10" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.font: TRILOBITE's modeling structure allows for rapid implementation of transient models by tying together elements from the pre-existing physics libraries and / or developing custom physics methods.

div.font: TRILOBITE's inference pipelines allow easy interacting with various sampling algorithms (MCMC, nested sampling, etc.) as well as use in simulation based inference (SBI) techniques.
